# Blackhole Trap
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Blackhole%20Trap&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Blackhole Trap
| desc = The first object to ever survive a blackhole, now imbued with it's powerful gravity. 
| slot = trap
| tier = GL
| rarity = g
| soulbound = yes

| cost = 110
| damage = 4370
| radius =6.8
| triggerradius = 3.4
| armtime = 20
| cooldown = 0
| fameb = 6
| bonuses = {{Stat|att|3}}{{Stat|vit|3}}{{Stat|wis|3}}
| effects = yes
| slowed = 6.5
| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by 
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavTraps}}
</noinclude>
